nasb.text: if you do not oppress the alien, the orphan, or the widow, and do not shed innocent blood in this place, nor walk after other gods to your own ruin,

esv.text: if you do not oppress the sojourner, the fatherless, or the widow, or shed innocent blood in this place, and if you do not go after other gods to your own harm,

cnv.text: 如果你們不欺壓寄居的，不欺壓孤兒寡婦，不在這地方流無辜人的血，也不跟從別的神，自招禍患；

ccb.text: 不欺压异乡人和孤儿寡妇，不在这地方滥杀无辜，不拜其他神明自取毁灭，
